## Sampling diagnostics

R-hat and effective sample size (ESS) over the scalar parameters; the
equal-tailed interval matches the report cards below.

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = _csv("diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag if diag is not None else "No diagnostics table."
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Pareto-k is load-bearing at n ≈ 33–54 (one influential child can drive elpd);
# rank and ESS-evolution check mixing.
print(_img("pareto_k.png", "Pareto-k (LOO influence; flag k > 0.7)"))
print(_img("rank_plot.png", "Rank plot of the effect (mixing)"))
print(_img("ess_evolution.png", "ESS evolution (target 400)"))
print(_img("loo_pit.png", "LOO-PIT calibration"))
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Deterministics / HSGP basis-weight summary (only emitted for GP-bearing variants).
_det = _csv("diagnostics_deterministics.csv", index_col=0)
if _det is not None:
    print("### Deterministics / basis weights\n")
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
_det if _det is not None else None
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Trace, energy, and posterior plots (appendix)"}

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print(_img("trace_plot.png", "Trace"))
print(_img("energy_plot.png", "Energy"))
print(_img("posterior_plot.png", "Posterior"))
print(_img("pair_plot.png", "Pairs"))
```

:::

## Posterior-predictive check

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print(_img("posterior_predictive_check.png", "Posterior-predictive vs observed"))
```
